meta_title: For Founders: idea validation to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to idea validation and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Idea Validation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to perform idea validation and overcome a lack of portfolio. A expert-led guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your SaaS MVP.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the perfect portfolio. Idea validation is your new currency. By using Antigravity for rapid prototyping and Claude Code for automated iteration, you can build a high-fidelity MVP in hours. Prove market demand through actual user interaction rather than legacy credentials. Build, test, and pivot to revenue.
content.intro:
The blank screen is a founder’s worst enemy. You have the vision, but the lack of a portfolio acts as a wall between you and your first paying customer. You feel the crushing weight of 'social proof'—the idea that until you've built something great, you aren't trusted to build the next thing. It’s a paradox that kills 90% of startups before they launch.

But here is the secret: the market doesn't care about your past work. It cares about the solution to its current pain. We are going to bypass the need for a legacy portfolio by using AI-driven rapid validation. We will transform you from a 'non-technical founder' into a shipping machine, proving your concept with code that actually functions, not just a resume.

steps.title: Define the Value Prop
steps.description: Identify the specific pain point. Don't build a platform; build a tool that solves one expensive problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Generate a lean MVP feature list for a [Problem] solution that targets [Niche]. Focus on one core action that solves the problem in under 3 clicks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a project roadmap file named MVP_PLAN.md focusing on the core value proposition defined in Antigravity'

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Use AI to generate the foundational file structure so you don't get stuck on boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a clean, modern Next.js + Tailwind CSS project structure for a landing page and a single-function dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate the directory structure and initialize the core components based on the Antigravity plan'

steps.title: Build the Conversion Engine
steps.description: Don't build features yet; build the capture mechanism. Validate demand before you write business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a high-converting landing page component with a waitlist capture form and a clear CTA to a Calendly link.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement the landing page component and ensure form validation is active'

steps.title: Automate User Feedback Loops
steps.description: Integrate a simple feedback loop so every visitor provides data on your idea.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a simple feedback toast notification that captures user intent if they decide to close the landing page.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add a feedback hook to the UI that logs interactions to a local JSON file for analysis'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Push to Vercel to get a live URL. An idea is only valid when it is live and accessible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide the exact CLI steps to deploy this Next.js project to Vercel via terminal.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'check for deployment readiness and provide the final build command'

pro_tips: Prioritize 'Time-to-First-Feedback' over feature density; if you aren't getting data, you aren't building.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code into modular components immediately to keep technical debt at zero.
Never build a login system until you have at least 10 people on your waitlist; use magic links or simple guest sessions.
Treat your landing page copy as the product; if people don't click, your idea is wrong, not your code.
Leverage Antigravity to generate your 'About' page content—position yourself as an expert by detailing your research process, not just your history.
content.next_steps: Once your landing page is live, share it with 50 people in your niche. If you get zero sign-ups, iterate the copy using Claude Code. If you get sign-ups, start coding the core feature immediately.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the tools to bypass the portfolio gatekeepers and start building your legacy. Stop waiting for permission and start building your proof. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
